# trinogateway_backends (Data Source)

List of Trino backends.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `clusters` (Attributes List) List of Trino backends. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clusters))

<a id="nestedatt--clusters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clusters`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the backend is active.
- `external_url` (String) The external URL for the backend.
- `name` (String) The name of the backend.
- `proxy_to` (String) The proxy URL for the backend.
- `routing_group` (String) The routing group for the backend.
